reviews.comment:
En el momento que fuí, no habia Nafta Super. Llegó un rato después y obviamente una larga fila para cargar. El problema fronterizo se puede resolver cargando solamente a vehiculos con patente argentina. En la empresa de enfrente, hay fila para vehiculos con patente Argentina y fila para vehiculos con patente Brasilera.

(Translated by Google)
When I went, there was no premium gasoline. It arrived a while later, and obviously there was a long line to fill up. The border issue can be resolved by only allowing vehicles with Argentine license plates to fill up. At the station across the street, there's a line for vehicles with Argentine plates and a line for vehicles with Brazilian plates.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1b0ttR1l3EAE
